source_pr.title: stats: optimize unit test execution time
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Stats unit test runs slow. ### What is changed and how it works? - There are some costly ddl operations like `truncate table`, they are changed to `delete from` - Combining stats test so we do not need to boostrap many times. - Rewrite some tests so we do not need to sleep - Reduce the testing row count of CM Sketch After the changes, the exectution time is reduced from 10s to 2.5s. ### Check List Tests - Unit test Code changes - Just unit test Side effects - None Related changes - None PTAL @zz-jason @winoros @eurekaka --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8597)

root_cause_explanation: Stats tests used fixed time.Sleep(...) to wait for stats/histograms to load, which is timing-sensitive and slow. This PR stabilizes by removing sleeps and explicitly triggering/awaiting the needed stats loading (e.g., LoadNeededHistograms) instead.
fix_pattern: Replace time.Sleep-based synchronization with deterministic stats loading/waiting.

evidence: files: statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/ddl_test.go, statistics/dump_test.go, statistics/gc_test.go, statistics/handle_test.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go, statistics/update_test.go
